site.description: Base template for creating projects with Astro.
home.title: Base template for Astro projects
home.description: A simple base with Tailwind, MDX, sitemap, technical SEO, GitHub Pages and smoke tests so you can start projects without repeating setup.

notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.
